company.products: Floor mats, liners, automotive accessories, home/pet products
company.geography: 11 US facilities (primarily Illinois), sells in 79 countries
company.business_model: Direct-to-consumer + dealer network. 95% US manufacturing. Make-to-order model with in-house mold development.

facilities.sq_footage: Not found in public sources — inferred large based on 11 facilities and $500M+ revenue

jobspy_results.notes: No spotter/yard/hostler postings found at WeatherTech. Active postings include Class A CDL Driver/Forklift Operator and Reach Truck/Forklift Operator roles — confirms logistics/warehouse operations exist but no yard-specific roles posted.
jobspy_results.caveats: Search conducted June 2026. WeatherTech may manage yard ops internally without posting under these specific titles.

sec_edgar_results.reason: Private company — no SEC filings. MacNeil Automotive Products Limited is privately held by founder David MacNeil.

news_signals.headline: WeatherTech CEO David MacNeil nominated for FTC commissioner seat
news_signals.detail: White House nominated MacNeil for FTC seat. If confirmed by Senate: 'would be required to step back from day-to-day involvement in WeatherTech and adhere to federal ethics requirements.'

news_signals.headline: WeatherTech 12th facility currently under development
news_signals.detail: 12th facility described as 'currently under development.' Type not confirmed — likely manufacturing based on pattern. Location not disclosed.

operational_intel.drop_hook_evidence: None found. Manufacturing model suggests inbound raw materials + outbound finished goods, but no explicit drop-and-hook confirmation.
operational_intel.hours_of_operation: Unknown. Manufacturing at scale often involves multi-shift / 24h, but not confirmed.
operational_intel.certifications_or_compliance: No OSHA citations found in search. No WAIRE applicability (Illinois, not California).
operational_intel.esg: Not found — no public ESG or Scope 3 commitments.

key_contacts_found.name: David MacNeil
key_contacts_found.title: Founder and CEO
key_contacts_found.source: LinkedIn, company website, multiple press sources
key_contacts_found.note: FTC nomination pending — attention may be shifting from day-to-day ops
